name: sapstack
description: SAP operations advisory + Evidence Loop session manager — 22 tools, 10 prompts, knowledge base integration (T-codes, SAP Notes, synonyms, period-end sequences, industry matrix)
author: BoxLogoDev

resources.name: sapstack Universal Rules
resources.description: Universal rules + Standard Response Format (dual mode: Quick Advisory + Evidence Loop)

resources.name: Verified T-code Registry
resources.description: 279 verified SAP T-codes with module mapping and ECC/S4 classification

resources.name: Verified SAP Notes
resources.description: 50+ verified SAP Notes catalog with keywords

resources.name: Symptom Index (NEW in v1.5.0)
resources.description: 20 natural-language symptom → module/T-code mappings, multilingual (ko/en + de/ja seed)

resources.name: Module SKILL.md
resources.description: 14 SAP module skills + sap-session (Evidence Loop orchestrator)

resources.name: Evidence Loop Schemas (NEW in v1.5.0)
resources.description: 5 JSON Schemas: evidence-bundle, followup-request, hypothesis, verdict, session-state

resources.name: Evidence Loop Session State (NEW in v1.5.0)
resources.description: Read current state of a session: turns, bundles, hypotheses, verdicts, audit trail

resources.name: Session Evidence Bundle
resources.description: Read a specific evidence bundle's items

resources.name: Active Sessions Index
resources.description: List all sessions in the workspace with status and last_updated

prompts.name: sap-fi-consultant
prompts.description: FI consultant agent prompt — systematic diagnosis of FI issues

prompts.name: sap-abap-developer
prompts.description: ABAP code reviewer — Clean Core, HANA optimization, ATC

prompts.name: sap-basis-consultant
prompts.description: Basis issue routing — dumps, WP hang, transport

prompts.name: sap-session-turn2-hypothesis
prompts.description: Evidence Loop Turn 2 — generate 2-4 falsifiable hypotheses with follow-up request (NEW in v1.5.0)

prompts.name: sap-session-turn4-verify
prompts.description: Evidence Loop Turn 4 — verdict with mandatory fix+rollback plans (NEW in v1.5.0)

prompts.name: korean-field-language
prompts.description: Field Korean translation prompt using synonyms.yaml (NEW in v1.7.0)

prompts.name: img-config-walk
prompts.description: IMG configuration step-by-step walkthrough guide (NEW in v1.7.0)

prompts.name: best-practice-review
prompts.description: SAP setup review against 3-Tier Best Practice framework (NEW in v1.7.0)

prompts.name: evidence-loop-turn2
prompts.description: Evidence Loop Turn 2 — hypothesis generation from evidence bundle (NEW in v1.7.0)

prompts.name: evidence-loop-turn4
prompts.description: Evidence Loop Turn 4 — verdict generation with fix+rollback plans (NEW in v1.7.0)

tools.name: resolve_sap_note
tools.description: Search verified SAP Notes by keyword

tools.name: check_tcode
tools.description: Verify if a T-code is in the verified registry

tools.name: list_plugins
tools.description: List all sapstack plugin modules (14 + sap-session)

tools.name: resolve_symptom
tools.description: Fuzzy-match natural language symptom against data/symptom-index.yaml (NEW in v1.5.0)

query.description: Symptom description in any supported language

tools.name: start_session
tools.description: Start a new Evidence Loop session (Stable in v1.6.0)

tools.name: add_evidence
tools.description: Add an evidence bundle to an existing session (Stable in v1.6.0)

tools.name: next_turn
tools.description: Run the next Evidence Loop turn (Hypothesis or Verify) for a session (Stable in v1.6.0)

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List all Evidence Loop sessions in workspace with status filters (NEW in v1.5.0)

tools.name: validate_session_file
tools.description: Validate a session YAML file against its schema (Stable in v1.6.0)

path.description: Relative path to YAML file under .sapstack/sessions/

tools.name: list_tcodes_by_module
tools.description: List all T-codes in a specific SAP module (NEW in v1.7.0)

module.description: SAP module code: FI, CO, MM, SD, PP, HCM, QM, PM, WM, EWM, GTS, BTP, ABAP, BASIS

tools.name: list_agents_for_industry
tools.description: List prioritized consultant agents by industry vertical (NEW in v1.7.0)

industry.description: Industry: manufacturing, retail, financial-services, healthcare, etc.

tools.name: get_period_end_sequence
tools.description: Return ordered period-end closing steps with dependencies (monthly/quarterly/yearly) (NEW in v1.7.0)

tools.name: lookup_synonym
tools.description: Find canonical term and all variants from Korean field language synonyms.yaml (NEW in v1.7.0)

term.description: Term to look up (Korean or English)

tools.name: list_img_guides
tools.description: List IMG configuration step-by-step guides by module (NEW in v1.7.0)

module.description: Optional: SAP module code (FI, CO, MM, etc.)

tools.name: list_best_practices
tools.description: List best practices by module and tier (Operational, Period-End, Governance) (NEW in v1.7.0)

tools.name: get_master_data_rules
tools.description: Get required fields and validation rules for master data types (vendor, customer, material, cost-center, gl-account) (NEW in v1.7.0)

tools.name: find_sap_note_by_module
tools.description: Search SAP Notes by module with filtering (NEW in v1.7.0)

tools.name: add_followup_request
tools.description: Add follow-up checklist items to session (Turn 2 evidence collection) (NEW in v1.7.0)

items.description: Check items with purpose, action, expected_outcome, priority, estimated_minutes

tools.name: submit_hypothesis
tools.description: Submit 2-4 hypotheses with falsification criteria to session (Turn 2) (NEW in v1.7.0)

hypotheses.description: Hypothesis objects with statement, technical_chain, confidence_tier, falsification_evidence

tools.name: submit_verdict
tools.description: Submit verdict with fix plans and rollback procedures (Turn 4) (NEW in v1.7.0)

resolutions.description: Resolution objects with hypothesis_id, status, fix_plan, rollback_plan

tools.name: find_img_node_by_keyword
tools.description: Search IMG/cockpit configuration guides by keyword across all modules — returns matched files, lines, and SPRO paths (NEW in v2.3)

tools.name: symptom_to_agent_auto
tools.description: Match a natural-language symptom to symptom-index entries and recommend consultant agents via likely_modules (NEW in v2.3)

tools.name: sap_note_steps
tools.description: Return SAP Note pointer metadata + diagnostic steps assembled from symptom-index back-references (sap-notes.yaml is pointer-only; body is on SAP Support Portal) (NEW in v2.3)

implementation.write_tools: 9 tools — start_session, add_evidence, next_turn, validate_session_file, add_followup_request, submit_hypothesis, submit_verdict

v1_7_0_new_features: 8 new read tools — list_tcodes_by_module, list_agents_for_industry, get_period_end_sequence, lookup_synonym, list_img_guides, list_best_practices, get_master_data_rules, find_sap_note_by_module
3 new write tools — add_followup_request, submit_hypothesis, submit_verdict
5 new prompts — korean-field-language, img-config-walk, best-practice-review, evidence-loop-turn2, evidence-loop-turn4
Knowledge base integration — T-codes, SAP Notes, period-end sequences, industry matrix, synonyms
Synonym query expansion for Korean field language
Best practice compliance checks (3-Tier framework: Operational, Period-End, Governance)
v1_6_0_features: Session creation with state machine (intake → hypothesizing → awaiting_evidence → verifying → resolved)
Evidence bundle validation with Ajv against evidence-bundle.schema.yaml
State machine transitions with turn management
Atomic writes (write-to-temp, rename) for data integrity
Schema validation on all write operations
notes: The manifest defines the complete contract for MCP-aware clients.
All tools (read and write) are production-ready with full validation.
No live SAP connection — all operations use local knowledge base files.
Prompts can be used by LLM clients for structured reasoning (Evidence Loop turns, Korean field language translation, IMG configuration guidance, BP compliance review).

Knowledge base files: tcodes.yaml (279+ T-codes), sap-notes.yaml (50+ notes), symptom-index.yaml (20+ symptoms), synonyms.yaml (58 terms), period-end-sequence.yaml (30+ steps), industry-matrix.yaml (6 industries).
